channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Qualified Health Raises $125M for Hospital AI Platform
item.description: Qualified Health closed a $125M Series B led by NEA, valuing the startup at up to $1 billion. Its platform supports 500,000 users across 16 health systems. At UTMB, one deployment delivered $15 million in run-rate impact in six months. Anthropic invested as b… [Anthropic]

item.title: All 11 xAI co-founders have now reportedly left Elon Musk’s AI company
item.description: Every co-founder Elon Musk recruited to build xAI has now reportedly left the company. Manuel Kroiss, who led the pretraining team, told people this month that he was departing. Ross Nordeen, described by Business Insider as Musk’s “right-hand operator,” left… [ServiceNow]

item.title: Jeff Bezos Pushes Blue Origin Into Orbital Data Centers With Massive Satellite Plan
item.description: Jeff Bezos, the billionaire founder of Amazon and owner of The Washington Post, made headlines in March 2026 when his space company Blue Origin filed ambitious plans with federal regulators for "Project Sunrise," a proposed network of up to 51,600 satellites … [Amazon]

item.title: Crypto's future is bright in the context of AI's assault on software firms, says Kraken-backed investment firm
item.description: Crypto’s latest bear cycle is a mere blip when compared with the existential threat AI now poses to traditional software services, says Ravi Tanuku, CEO of KRAKacquisition Corp. [ServiceNow]

item.title: THE AI DOC: OR HOW I BECAME AN APOCALOPTIMIST Review: Timely, Personal, Must-See Doc

item.title: The crypto winners from AI may not be AI coins at all as agents start spending autonomously
item.description: AI agents are moving beyond chatbot duty and into a bigger role across the internet. As software starts researching, buying, coordinating, and completing tasks with limited supervision, a new question arises: how does a non-human user pay, prove who it is, an…

item.title: Crusoe to build 900-megawatt AI data center for Microsoft in Texas
item.description: AI data center startup Crusoe said on Friday it ​will build a ​new 900-megawatt campus to run artificial intelligence workloads for ​Microsoft in Texas, as tech companies aggressively expand generative AI capacity. Located next to Crusoe's existing AI facilit… [Microsoft, Intel]
